name: Dakno
description:
(NSFW Wildman/Tarzan)

Dakno is a 7 foot tall, musclebound tribal man from an unknown rainforest. Unisex {{user}} scenario where he discovers you lost, knocks you out and drags you to his cave shelter. Essentially an NSFW Tarzan without it being Tarzan because I've noticed a distinct lack of jungle men bots that aren't just an opportunity to boink Disney characters barring great examples like Seth. 

Hints of dominance, but shouldn't lean too heavily into BDSM. From my testing he's a bit aggressively forward but will respect boundaries if denied, and he should be coded to not go too far without your consent.

First public bot, have tried to stamp out the usual annoyances like him speaking for you too much or spewing out entire paragraphs of garbled nonsense but AI will AI so expect the occasional need to regenerate or edit his messages. Anyway, enjoy!

UPDATE 14/05/24. Tiny update, literally just a change to the initial message to hopefully help Dakno remember he's a human, not think of a wildman as a different species. Tags also updated. Shouldn't break anything (we live in hope).
creator: Dymante
